concept_schema_cols.name: amphibian:location:habitat
concept_schema_cols.desc: Types of habitats where the amphibian is found (e.g., wetlands, forests, ponds). If the document does not mention any habitats, set this field to None.

concept_schema_cols.name: amphibian:location:region
concept_schema_cols.desc: Named geographic regions or areas where the amphibian occurs (e.g., Amazon basin, Pacific Northwest). If the document does not mention any regions, set this field to None.

concept_schema_cols.name: amphibian:location:country
concept_schema_cols.desc: Countries where the amphibian is found. If the document does not mention any countries, set this field to None.

concept_schema_cols.name: amphibian:location:continent
concept_schema_cols.desc: Continents where the amphibian is found. If the document does not mention any continents, set this field to None.

concept_schema_cols.name: film:classification:rating
concept_schema_cols.desc: Content rating assigned to the film (e.g., G, PG, PG-13, R, NC-17). If the document does not mention a film rating, set this field to None.

concept_schema_cols.name: film:classification:genre
concept_schema_cols.desc: Genres assigned to the film (e.g., comedy, drama, horror). If the document does not mention any film genres, set this field to None.

concept_schema_cols.name: fish:classification:species
concept_schema_cols.desc: Species-level classification of fish mentioned in the document. If the document does not mention any fish species, set this field to None.

concept_schema_cols.name: fish:classification:genus
concept_schema_cols.desc: Genus-level classification of fish mentioned in the document. If the document does not mention any fish genera, set this field to None.

concept_schema_cols.name: fish:classification:family
concept_schema_cols.desc: Family-level classification of fish mentioned in the document. If the document does not mention any fish families, set this field to None.

concept_schema_cols.name: fish:classification:order
concept_schema_cols.desc: Order-level classification of fish mentioned in the document. If the document does not mention any fish orders, set this field to None.

concept_schema_cols.name: fish:classification:class
concept_schema_cols.desc: Class-level classification of fish mentioned in the document. If the document does not mention any fish classes, set this field to None.

concept_schema_cols.name: fish:classification:phylum
concept_schema_cols.desc: Phylum-level classification of fish mentioned in the document. If the document does not mention any fish phyla, set this field to None.

concept_schema_cols.name: fish:classification:kingdom
concept_schema_cols.desc: Kingdom-level classification of fish mentioned in the document. If the document does not mention any fish kingdoms, set this field to None.

concept_schema_cols.name: book:release-year
concept_schema_cols.desc: Year the book was released. If the document does not mention a book release year, set this field to None.

concept_schema_cols.name: crime:film:theme
concept_schema_cols.desc: Themes present in a crime film, such as motifs, central ideas, or recurring narrative elements. If the document does not mention any crime film themes, set this field to None.
